description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Windows Releases that triggers on push to master, actions branches and tags. The workflow consists of two jobs: get_version_name and build. The get_version_name job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, and outputs the version name and revision count. The build job runs on windows-2019, needs get_version_name, and performs a matrix build with different architectures, CUDA versions, and platforms. It checks out dependencies, sets up CUDA, builds with MSBuild, creates an archive, and uploads the release asset to GitHub.
